_meta.title: PLE Science 2024 Uganda - V2 import package
notes: Built against the same V2 package shape as the successful KCPE Mathematics 2023 and PLE Mathematics 2015 imports.
Source reconciliation selected the complete final import file and corrected Q44 to the four-mark Section B contract from the PDF.
Diagram references were mapped to existing public exam assets where matching assets exist.

exam.title: PLE Science 2024
exam.subject: Science
exam.overallInstructions: This paper has two sections: Section A and Section B. Answer all questions in the spaces provided.

sections.title: Section A
sections.sharedInstructions: Questions 1 to 40 carry one mark each. Answer all questions.

sections.title: Section B
sections.sharedInstructions: Questions 41 to 55 carry four marks each. Answer all questions.

instructionGroups.instructionsMarkdown: Answer all questions in Section A. Give the exact word, phrase, or short answer required.
Answer all questions in Section B. For multi-part questions, answer each labelled part separately.

items.stemMarkdown: Name any one type of latrine.
Give any one reason why it is dangerous to take shelter under tall trees during rain.
State any one function of the diaphragm during the process of breathing.
Name any one agent of soil erosion.

The diagram below shows an animal in the group of invertebrates. Use it to answer questions 5 and 6.

Name the animal shown in the diagram.

mediaRefs.altText: Diagram of a snail for Questions 5 and 6
mediaRefs.caption: Question 5 diagram

items.stemMarkdown: State the group of invertebrates to which the animal belongs.
Mention any one way in which vegetables can be kept fresh for some time.
State one way in which bacteria are useful in the formation of soil.
Give the reason why a person suffering from bilharzia develops anaemia.
Mention one way in which air circulation in a rabbit hutch can be improved.
State the reason why the human skin develops goose pimples during cold weather.
Give any one way in which you can utilise empty plastic bottles at home.
Mention one function of a bandage found in a first aid kit.
State any one way in which fermentation is important in our daily life.
State any one reason why a builder would prefer a pulley to an inclined plane when lifting sand from the ground to the top of a building.

The diagram below shows a human body organ. Use it to answer questions 16 and 17.

Name the organ shown above.

mediaRefs.altText: Diagram of a kidney for Questions 16 and 17
mediaRefs.caption: Question 16 diagram

items.stemMarkdown: Give the function of the part labelled N.
Identify any one effect of pests and diseases on tuber crops.
State any one way in which taking medicine without the instruction of a health worker can affect a family.
Mention any one reason why harvesting of honey should be done during day time.
Name the disorder in the skeletal system where a bone moves away from its normal position at the joint.
State the reason why a cubic unit of wool weighs less than a cubic unit of a stone.
State one way in which paddocking method of grazing cattle helps to break the life cycle of pests on a farm.
Give one way in which rusting is important to the environment.
Name the element of Primary Health Care which promotes the human body cleanliness.
Mention any one activity a School Health Club can do to improve the health of people in school.
State the property of air used in filling balloons.
State any one way in which planting of trees alongside other crops improves the quality of soil.
Give one reason why we should regularly wash our hands with clean water and soap.
Mention one way in which the antennae of insects are similar to the human skin in terms of function.
Give one reason why the vacuum in a thermos flask prevents heat loss by conduction and convection.

The diagram below shows a method of planting crops. Use it to answer questions 32 and 33.

Identify the method of planting crops shown above.

mediaRefs.altText: Diagram of a crop planting method for Questions 32 and 33
mediaRefs.caption: Question 32 diagram

items.stemMarkdown: State any one advantage of the method of planting crops shown in the diagram above.
Give any one example of an emotional change in adolescents.
Name the immunisable viral disease which is spread due to poor sanitation.
State the reason why a ray of light bends as it passes through a glass block.
State any one way of conserving water as a resource in the environment.
Mention one reason why you are encouraged to brush the tongue as well when cleaning the teeth.
Mention any one way in which electric shocks can be prevented in a home.
Give any one way in which crop farmers can keep seeds viable for a long time.

(a) Name the class of food that helps in the repair of body cells.
(b) Apart from contamination of food, mention any two other challenges that people who buy food from markets get.
(c) State any one way of controlling food contamination in a market.

(a) Name the germ that causes cholera.
(b) Explain why cholera is common in heavily populated communities.
(c) Apart from proper use of latrines, mention any one other way of controlling the spread of cholera in the communities in (b) above.

(a) Name the correct garden tool for transplanting seedlings.
(b) State the reason why evening time is the best for transplanting seedlings.
(c) Mention any two advantages of mulching a garden after transplanting.

The diagram below shows part of the human digestive system. Use it to answer the questions that follow.

(a) Name the parts labelled X, W and Y.
(b) State any one function of parts Y and Z.

The table below shows some of the steps followed in the cleaning of clothes and the purpose of each step. Complete the table correctly.

| Step | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| _____ | Separating clothes according to washing needs. |
| Soaking | _____ |
| _____ | Removing dirty soapy water from the clothes. |
| Ironing | _____ |

(a) Give the meaning of the term electromagnet.
(b) You are provided with the following items: Iron nail, copper wire, a dry cell and some pins. Describe how you can use the items to make a magnet.

(a) Mention any two materials that can be used to produce biogas.
(b) Give a reason why a biogas digester should be tightly sealed.
(c) State any one advantage of using biogas.

The diagram below shows a person wearing a protective item made of cloth. Use it to answer the following questions.

(a) Name the protective item labelled K.
(b) Identify any two diseases that can be prevented by the use of the protective item K.
(c) Mention any one good practice of using the protective item K.

(a) Mention one example of musical instruments in each of the groups below:
(i) String Instruments
(ii) Percussion Instruments
(b) Name any two methods of storing sound.

(a) State the name given to insects that live and work together.
(b) Give any one way in which insects are useful to people.
(c) State any two human activities that are dangerous to insects in the environment.

The diagram below shows types of weather. Study it and answer the questions that follow.

(a) Name the type of weather marked C.
(b) State one way in which the type of weather in A helps in formation of the type of weather in D.
(c) Give one way in which people protect themselves from the effects of the type of weather in B.
(d) State any one way in which too much of the type of weather in A is dangerous to the environment.

(a) State the meaning of the term vaccine.
(b) Mention the way in which polio vaccine is administered.
(c) State the reason why vaccines should be stored in a cool place.
(d) Identify any one way you can support immunization programmes in your community.

(a) Name the physical change which leads to the formation of the following:
(i) Ice
(ii) Rainfall
(b) State any two effects of physical changes caused by soil erosion in the environment.

(a) Name the two muscles found in the human arm.
(b) State any one function of muscles in the human body.
(c) State the importance of maintaining correct posture in humans.

(a) The diagram below shows a cup 12 cm high placed 30 cm in front of a plane mirror. Draw the image of the cup.
(b) The diagram below shows a reflection on a plane mirror PQ.
(i) Name ray A.
(ii) State the relationship between angles m and y.

mediaRefs.altText: Plane mirror cup diagram for Question 55(a)
mediaRefs.caption: Question 55 diagram

mediaRefs.altText: Plane mirror reflection diagram for Question 55(b)
mediaRefs.caption: Question 55 diagram

modelAnswerVersions.explanation: A pit latrine is one common type of toilet used for safe disposal of human waste. Other acceptable types include VIP latrine, flush latrine, or compost latrine.
modelAnswerVersions.changeReason: Initial PLE Science 2024 V2 import package.

modelAnswerVersions.explanation: Tall trees can attract lightning, which may injure or kill someone under them.
modelAnswerVersions.changeReason: Initial PLE Science 2024 V2 import package.
acceptableAlternatives: tree can be struck by lightning

modelAnswerVersions.approvedAnswer: It helps air enter and leave the lungs
modelAnswerVersions.explanation: The diaphragm contracts and flattens during inhalation, increasing chest space and helping air enter the lungs. During exhalation, it relaxes and pushes air out.
modelAnswerVersions.changeReason: Initial PLE Science 2024 V2 import package.

modelAnswerVersions.explanation: Moving water carries away topsoil. Wind is another agent of soil erosion.
modelAnswerVersions.changeReason: Initial PLE Science 2024 V2 import package.

modelAnswerVersions.explanation: The diagram shows a snail with a shell and soft body.
modelAnswerVersions.changeReason: Initial PLE Science 2024 V2 import package.

modelAnswerVersions.explanation: A snail belongs to the mollusc group (also spelled mollusks).
modelAnswerVersions.changeReason: Initial PLE Science 2024 V2 import package.

modelAnswerVersions.approvedAnswer: Keep them in a cool place
modelAnswerVersions.explanation: Cool conditions slow wilting and spoilage. Other methods include wrapping in a damp cloth or storing in a refrigerator.
modelAnswerVersions.changeReason: Initial PLE Science 2024 V2 import package.
acceptableAlternatives: put them in a cool place
store them in a cool place

modelAnswerVersions.approvedAnswer: They decompose dead plants and animals
modelAnswerVersions.explanation: Decomposition by bacteria adds humus to the soil, improving fertility.
modelAnswerVersions.changeReason: Initial PLE Science 2024 V2 import package.

modelAnswerVersions.explanation: Bilharzia parasites damage body tissues and may lead to blood loss, causing anaemia.
modelAnswerVersions.changeReason: Initial PLE Science 2024 V2 import package.
acceptableAlternatives: it makes the person lose blood

modelAnswerVersions.explanation: Openings allow fresh air to move through the hutch.
modelAnswerVersions.changeReason: Initial PLE Science 2024 V2 import package.

modelAnswerVersions.explanation: Goose pimples help trap a layer of air near the skin and reduce loss of body heat.
modelAnswerVersions.changeReason: Initial PLE Science 2024 V2 import package.

modelAnswerVersions.explanation: Empty bottles can be reused instead of thrown away. Other uses include making planters, funnels, or bird feeders.
modelAnswerVersions.changeReason: Initial PLE Science 2024 V2 import package.

modelAnswerVersions.approvedAnswer: To cover and protect a wound
modelAnswerVersions.explanation: A bandage helps stop dirt entering a wound and can support injured parts.
modelAnswerVersions.changeReason: Initial PLE Science 2024 V2 import package.

modelAnswerVersions.approvedAnswer: It is used in making bread
modelAnswerVersions.explanation: Fermentation by yeast helps dough rise. Other uses include making yogurt, beer, and traditional beverages.
modelAnswerVersions.changeReason: Initial PLE Science 2024 V2 import package.

modelAnswerVersions.approvedAnswer: It lifts the load vertically using less effort over height
modelAnswerVersions.explanation: A pulley is convenient where materials must be raised straight up to higher levels.
modelAnswerVersions.changeReason: Initial PLE Science 2024 V2 import package.

modelAnswerVersions.explanation: The diagram shows a kidney, which is part of the excretory system.
modelAnswerVersions.changeReason: Initial PLE Science 2024 V2 import package.

modelAnswerVersions.approvedAnswer: It carries urine from the kidney to the bladder
